text: Being in this space, I am surrounded by symbols of human progress and inquiry—the glass-enclosed room, the technological displays, and the words about research and development evoke a sense of curiosity. There is an atmosphere of anticipation, as if new ideas and collaborations are continuously being born here. I feel both small, in the face of such collective effort, and invigorated, drawn to contemplate the interplay between human creativity, technology, and the future.
